hard_stops.logic: applicant information must be provided before any screening activities begin
screening criteria reference protected class characteristics — Fair Housing Act violation
blanket denial based on criminal history without individualized assessment — HUD guidance violation and disparate impact risk
adverse action notice not provided to denied applicant — Fair Credit Reporting Act violation

soft_flags.logic: applicant income ratio is below tenant's minimum income requirement — may not meet qualification criteria
applicant credit score is below tenant's minimum credit score requirement — additional review recommended
applicant has prior eviction filings — individualized assessment required per fair housing guidance
application is missing required documents — cannot complete screening until all materials are received
